/usr/bin/ar qc libhud-common.a "CMakeFiles/hud-common.dir/hud-common_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-common.dir/AppstackModel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-common.dir/Action.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-common.dir/ActionGroup.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-common.dir/Description.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-common.dir/DBusTypes.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-common.dir/HudDee.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-common.dir/MenuModel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-common.dir/NameObject.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-common.dir/ResultsModel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-common.dir/Suggestion.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-common.dir/WindowInfo.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-common.dir/WindowStackInterface.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-common.dir/ApplicationInterface.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libhud-common.a
